CAMPUS FACILITIES

NIRF University Rankings79 (2025)69 (2024)
NIRF Engineering Rankings151-200 (2025)151-200 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam.
  • 40% of the seats are filled through JoSAA/CSAB counselling under All India Quota and 60% of the seats are filled through Institutional counselling under Northeastern Quota. Note that the Food Engineering & Technology department has different seat distribution: 40% JoSAA/CSAB, 30% NE quota, and 30% CUET-UG.
  • For All India Quota (40% seats), candidates must either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • For NE Quota (60% seats), candidates must secure at least 60% marks (55% for reserved categories) in Class XII with Physics and Mathematics. These seats are reserved for the permanent residents of North-eastern states and require a PRC (permanent residence certificate).

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Food Engineering and Technology
  • Mechanical Engineering

B.Des. - 4 Years

  • Design
